prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon preparation with high carbohydrate intake and optimal hydration strategy

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals and snacks for a single day
Emphasizes high carbohydrate content appropriate for marathon training
Includes specific hydration recommendations throughout the day
Provides realistic, compact format suitable for an athlete's schedule
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a professional marathon runner requiring high-carbohydrate intake and hydration strategy

prompt_inputs.goal: Competition preparation with easily digestible meals that won't cause stomach discomfort during swimming

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals for one day
All meals are easily digestible and unlikely to cause stomach discomfort in water
Plan respects lactose intolerance and avoids high-fiber foods
Meals provide adequate calories and nutrients for a competitive swimmer
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a swimmer preparing for competition requiring meals that won't cause stomach discomfort in water

prompt_inputs.goal: Support flexibility and performance while minimizing bloating during training
prompt_inputs.restrictions: No dairy, no high-fiber foods, no heavy oils

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals for one full day
All meals are light, easily digestible, and avoid bloating triggers
Meals support flexibility and athletic performance for an elite gymnast
All dietary restrictions are respected
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an elite gymnast needing light meals that support flexibility and minimal bloating

prompt_inputs.goal: High protein intake for CrossFit performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one full day
All meals are vegetarian with plant-based protein sources
Provides adequate protein intake for an athlete of this size and goal
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a vegetarian CrossFit athlete needing high protein from plant-based sources

prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and maintain energy for intense football training

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 4000+ calories across all meals and snacks
Includes 5-6 eating occasions (breakfast, snack, lunch, snack, dinner, optional snack)
Provides high protein content (1.6-2.2g per kg body weight) to support muscle building
Meals are practical and quick to prepare for a busy teenager
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a teenage American football player with a 4000+ calorie daily requirement

prompt_inputs.goal: Weight cut to 89 kg for weigh-in while maintaining strength and performance
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Maximum 2000 calories, maximum 2000mg sodium, no high-sodium processed foods

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals approximately 2000 calories or fewer
Total sodium content does not exceed 2000mg across all meals
Plan includes 3 distinct meals suitable for a heavyweight boxer maintaining muscle during weight cut
All meals are compact and realistic to consume within a single day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a heavyweight boxer during a weight-cut phase with strict caloric and sodium constraints

prompt_inputs.goal: Sustained energy and endurance for ultramarathon running (50+ km)

solution_criteria: Meal plan is 1 day only and includes 3+ meals/snacks with specific foods
All foods are vegan with no animal products
Includes protein sources that provide complete amino acid profiles (e.g., quinoa, legumes, nuts, seeds, tofu)
Provides adequate sustained energy for ultramarathon endurance needs
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a vegan ultramarathon runner needing sustained energy and complete amino acid profiles

prompt_inputs.goal: Endurance cycling performance with stable blood sugar management
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Type 2 diabetes; requires low glycemic index foods and balanced carbohydrate distribution

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
All meals feature low glycemic index carbohydrates with protein and healthy fats to prevent blood sugar spikes
Includes pre/during/post-ride nutrition strategy appropriate for endurance cycling
Realistic and actionable with specific food examples
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a diabetic endurance cyclist needing blood sugar management throughout the day

prompt_inputs.goal: maintain energy and performance for soccer training and matches
prompt_inputs.restrictions: vegetarian, no access to oven or stove (only microwave and hot water kettle), budget of $15 for the day

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals and includes protein sources suitable for a vegetarian athlete
All foods are microwave-ready, no-cook, or require only hot water preparation
Total estimated cost does not exceed $15 and uses budget-friendly ingredients
Plan is compact and presented as a single day schedule with approximate calories and macronutrients noted
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a budget-conscious college soccer player with limited food access and cooking facilities

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize energy and performance for explosive sprint training with 3 sessions scheduled at 7am, 12pm, and 5pm

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 6 meals/snacks strategically timed around the 3 training sessions
Each pre-training meal/snack prioritizes quick-digesting carbohydrates and is consumed 30-90 minutes before training
Total daily macronutrients support sprint performance (~2800-3000 calories with adequate carbs for high-intensity work)
Plan is formatted as a single-day schedule with specific times and portion sizes
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sprinter requiring quick-digesting carbs and timing around explosive training sessions
